mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, turn_count) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{agentId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{turnCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, turn_count, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, turn_count, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
